hero.slide1_title: Kulawar Lafiya Ga Kowane Dan Najeriya
hero.slide1_sub: Tattaunawar likita ta yanar gizo ko da intanet ya yi rauni
hero.slide2_sub: Kwararru masu lasisi, suna shirye su taimaka a harshen da kake so
hero.slide3_title: Haɗa Likita Da Mara Lafiya Daga Nesa
hero.slide3_sub: Tattaunawar bidiyo mai ƙarfi kan kowanne na'ura

features_section.title: An Kera Shi Don Ya Tallafi Dukkan Yan Najeriya
features_section.subtitle: UbiMD na sauƙaƙa tattaunawar likita daga nesa cikin tsaro da inganci
features_section.card1_desc: Tattaunawar fuska-da-fuska mai aiki ko da a 2G/3G. Mun inganta tsarin don yin aiki da intanet mai rauni.
features_section.card2_desc: Ana haɗa ka da likitan da ya dace da alamomin ka, harshen ka, da yankinka.
features_section.card3_desc: Dauki hoto na magani, AI zai gano shi kuma ya bayyana maka.
features_section.card4_desc: Samu amsoshin tambayoyin lafiya cikin sauki ba tare da shiga ciki ba.
features_section.card5_desc: Duk likitocin da ke UbiMD an tabbatar da su don yin aiki a Najeriya.
features_section.card6_desc: UbiMD yana aiki akan wayoyi, kwamfutar hannu, da tsofaffin na’urori.

stats.title: Dandalin Lafiya Mai Aminci
stats.sub: Muna taimaka wa marasa lafiya da likitoci a fadin Najeriya

how_it_works_section.title: Yadda UbiMD Ke Aiki
how_it_works_section.step1_desc: Yi rijista cikin sauri da lambar wayarka.
how_it_works_section.step2_desc: Tsarinmu zai haɗa ka da likitan da ya dace da kai.
how_it_works_section.step3_desc: Fara tattaunawar bidiyo ko rubutu da likita nan take.

testimonials_section.title: Ra’ayoyin Jama’ar Najeriya
testimonials_section.t1_text: Tattaunawar ta kasance da sauri kuma likitan ya fahimci harshena.
testimonials_section.t2_text: UbiMD ya taimaka min na sami likita ko da intanet ya yi rauni.
testimonials_section.t3_text: AI ya taimaka min wajen gane maganin da zan sha.

early_access_section.title: Samu Shiga Na Farko
early_access_section.sub: Shiga jerin masu jira domin samun amfani da UbiMD kafin kowa.
